extraction.one_line_summary: YATES Simon attacked with 19km to go on Col d'Èze, gained 29 seconds maximum, won stage but fell 9 seconds short of GC as WOUT van Aert paced ROGLIC perfectly on descent
tactical_patterns: MARTINEZ Danny's EF attack at 50km neutralized by Jumbo depth, then punctured on descent showing high-risk Colombian timing.
YATES attacked with 19km when already carrying 10 bonus seconds, forcing 2v1 disadvantage against VAN AERT/ROGLIC on descent.
WOUT van Aert as sole domestique stabilized 20-second gap on Col d'Èze descent, proving one elite pacer beats numbers.
ROGLIC isolated early after KUSS/DENNIS dropped on penultimate climb but survived with only VAN AERT through final 46km.

rider_signals.MARTINEZ Danny: negative: punctured back wheel on descent after bonus sprint, lost podium from attacking position at 46km out
rider_signals.YATES Simon: positive: first win since May 2021 Giro, showed he can finish stage races with aggressive finale despite GC loss
rider_signals.VAN AERT Wout: positive: sole remaining domestique for final 46km, descended well enough to prevent Yates from taking 29-second gap
rider_signals.ROGLIC Primoz: positive: overcame psychological barrier of French stage race final-day collapses, held form after losing KUSS and DENNIS early
rider_signals.KUSS Steven: negative: dropped on penultimate climb with DENNIS, leaving Roglic exposed with 46km remaining
rider_signals.QUINTANA Nairo: neutral: first to attack Col d'Èze but caught, never in GC contention despite stage hunting
